## Description
<!-- Describe your changes in detail here. Why is this change required? What problem does it solve? -->

## Related Issue
<!-- If it fixes an open issue, please link to the issue here (e.g., "Fixes #123"). -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Please point out the type of change you have made. -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New component/feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Chore (updates/refactors that don't affect features or bugfixes)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project
- [ ] I have read the **CONTRIBUTING** document
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings/linting errors
- [ ] I have updated the documentation/registry accordingly (if applicable)

## Screenshots / Screen Recording
<!-- If your changes affect the UI, please provide before/after screenshots or screen recordings to help reviewers. -->
